ai_tips: Starting out at 1055m — HR opened at 100 and stayed calm through the opening stretch, a patient warm-up. 从海拔1055米出发——心率从100起步，开场阶段保持平稳，是很有耐心的热身。
0.35km in — pace 6:16/km, HR 158 (100% of the run average) as the effort builds. 进行到0.35公里——配速6:16/公里，心率158（全程均值的100%），强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 73m climb done, grade here 8.8%, HR 161. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——73米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度8.8%，心率161。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 1128m at 3.26km, HR 158. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点1128米，位于3.26公里处，心率158。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -18.7% at 3.41km — you let it flow at 3:48/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：3.41公里处坡度-18.7%——你顺势加速到3:48/公里，下坡信心不错。
3.79km — late-run check: pace 3:48/km, HR 169, still holding form well. 3.79公里——后程检查：配速3:48/公里，心率169，节奏保持得不错。

Finished 3.89km in 26:56 (avg 6:55/km, avg HR 158, max 175, +130m). Next time, close with 2-3 minutes of easy jogging to bring HR down before stopping. 完成3.89公里，用时26:56（平均配速6:55/公里，平均心率158，最高175，爬升130米）。下次结尾慢跑2-3分钟，让心率降下来再停。
